query: Segment all vehicles in image and get the pixel count for each of the segmented vehicle. Compute the total area of all the segmented vehicles using GSD: 0.125783611073 m/pixel. Calculate the side length of a perfect square having that same area in meters.
final_answer:
Pixel counts of segmented vehicles: [586, 465, 562, 795, 823, 823]
 Total area of all vehicles: approximately 64.15 m sq
 Side length of square with equivalent area: approximately 8.01 m

evaluation.question: Are the pixel counts for the six segmented vehicles listed as [586, 465, 562, 795, 823, 823] in the response?
Is the computed total area of approximately 64.15 m sq within the range of 57.74 to 70.57 m sq?
Is the calculated side length of the equivalent square approximately 8.01 m?
